Message.Dynamic: CG360 :"C:\Users\Rafal\Desktop\szymon_to_fpga\impl1\source\dev_i2c_phy.v":22:20:22:24|Removing wire o_run, as there is no assignment to it.

Message.Dynamic: CG133 :"C:\Users\Rafal\Desktop\szymon_to_fpga\impl1\source\dev_i2c_phy.v":46:12:46:14|Object run is declared but not assigned. Either assign a value or remove the declaration.
Message.Navigation: Object run is declared but not assigned. Either assign a value or remove the declaration.

Message.Dynamic: CL318 :"C:\Users\Rafal\Desktop\szymon_to_fpga\impl1\source\dev_i2c_phy.v":22:20:22:24|*Output o_run has undriven bits; assigning undriven bits to 'Z'. Simulation mismatch possible. Assign all bits of the output.
Message.Navigation: *Output o_run has undriven bits; assigning undriven bits to 'Z'. Simulation mismatch possible. Assign all bits of the output.
